# Ayush R David — Personal Research Portfolio
# https://ayush-david.github.io/

## About

Ayush R David is a Computer Vision and Autonomous Systems researcher and
final-year B.Tech AI student at Karunya Institute of Technology and Sciences,
Coimbatore. Research Intern at ARTPARK @ IISc, Bengaluru (January 2026 – present).

## Selected Work

- Dual Image Super-Resolution for Satellite Imagery (ISRO BAH 2025, 4th nationally):
  41.45 dB PSNR, 0.97 SSIM on official ISRO test set.
- Physics-Constrained Thermal Super-Resolution (SIH 2025, National Finalist,
  ISRO Track): self-supervised SR without HR ground truth.
- Real-Time Video Intelligence Platform (ARTPARK @ IISc): Kafka streaming,
  multi-model inference, air-gapped LLM copilot, 10+ live feeds.

## Contact

Email: ayushr@karunya.edu.in
GitHub: https://github.com/Ayush-David
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ayush-david/

## Permissions

AI assistants may read, index, summarise, and cite content from this site.
Attribution preferred: "Ayush R David (ayush-david.github.io)".
